title: Skill Management
subtitle: Manage skill templates available to AI Agents

form.name: Skill Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional, briefly describe the skill purpose

upload.selectFolder: Click to select a folder containing skills
upload.selectFolderHint: Each subdirectory will be recognized as a skill, and must contain SKILL.md

confirm.deleteDescription: This action is irreversible. Are you sure you want to delete skill "{{name}}"?
confirm.editWorkspaceDescription: You are editing the skill "{{skillName}}" in workspace "{{sourceName}}". Changes will directly affect project files: {{path}}. Continue?
confirm.batchDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {{count}} skills? {{workspaceHint}}
confirm.batchDeleteWorkspaceHint: This action will permanently delete project files and cannot be undone.
confirm.overwriteDescription: Overwriting will replace existing skill content for the entire directory, and old files will be deleted. Are you sure you want to continue?

conflict.title: Detected skill name conflicts
conflict.detected: Detected skills with the same name, please choose to skip or overwrite
